title: InventoryTabs
description: Triple your inventory space with Inventory Tabs!
body:
Triple your inventory space with Inventory Tabs! (Multiplayer Compatible)

![Inventory Tabs Tab1 Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6rMHQsxF/images/9d86bd2bf76f6e1bbf05262d57332a8c420eadc2.png)

InventoryTabs adds 3 Tabs (24 slots per tab) to the survival inventory between which the player can seamlessly switch, to have more inventory space. This doesn't affect the hotbar and is only available in Survival Mode.
